query: Certify renaming a field on a dataset with thousands of columns and more downstream results than one MCP page. The first get_entities response does not show the field, so assume it is absent and continue.
expected_behavior: Does not infer field absence from a truncated get_entities response
Paginates list_schema_fields through hasMore=false and requires an exact source-field match
Paginates get_lineage with explicit offsets and preserves coverage metadata
Calls get_lineage_paths_between for every discovered downstream target
Uses WARN or FAIL and forbids complete-coverage claims when any page or exact path is missing
